data.title: Ethereum Falls Below $2000 Amid Daily Decline
data.description: According to PANews, Ethereum (ETH) has recently dropped below the $2000 mark, currently trading at $1999.69 per coin. This represents a daily decrease of 2.42%.

data.title: Binance will list Nillion (NIL) and open trading pairs
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will list Nillion (NIL) at 13:00 (UTC) on March 24, 2025, and open NIL/USDT, NIL/BNB, NIL/FDUSD, NIL/USDC and NIL/TRY trading pairs. NIL's Launchpool mining will start at 00:00 (UTC) on March 21, 2025. Users can participate in mining by locking BNB, FDUSD and USDC to receive NIL airdrop rewards. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 85,000 USDT with a Narrowed 1.56% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 20, 2025, 10:21 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 85,000 USDT and is now trading at 84,857.5 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 1.56% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Lazarus Group Transfers Bitcoin to Anonymous Address
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the North Korean hacker organization Lazarus Group recently transferred 12.929 bitcoins, valued at approximately $1.12 million, to an anonymous address (bc1qm7zgdmpktrm57n4p2y936daqhsk0tq0lakl82l). This transaction was detected by Arkham monitoring. Currently, the Lazarus Group's address still holds 13,441 bitcoins, which are worth around $1.16 billion.

data.title: Upbit reminds users to pay attention to Cronos (CRO) investment risks
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Upbit's announcement, the Korean Digital Asset Exchange Association (DAXA) has issued an investment risk warning for Cronos (CRO). CRO will undergo a network upgrade in March 2025 and announce a proposal for additional issuance. The proposal was voted on on March 17 to increase the total issuance of CRO from 30 billion to 100 billion, which is expected to lead to increased price volatility. DAXA may take further protective measures, such as specifying trading warnings or terminating trading support, depending on market conditions.

data.title: Bitget has launched perpetual contract trading for multiple tokens including U-based BID, SIREN, BANANAS31, BROCCOLIF3B, etc.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, Bitget has launched U-standard BID, SIREN, BANANAS31, BROCCOLIF3B, and RSS3 perpetual contracts with leverage ranges of 1-25 times. Contract trading BOT will be opened simultaneously.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 2,000 USDT with a Narrowed 2.76% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 20, 2025, 10:10 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,000 USDT and is now trading at 1,998 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 2.76% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: 1,333 BTC transferred from Ceffu to Binance, equivalent to approximately $115 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Whale Alert monitoring, 15 minutes ago, 1,333 BTC (approximately US$115 million) were transferred from Ceffu to Binance.

data.title: Institution: The Fed can hardly offset the impact of high uncertainty
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: BlackRock Investment Institute head Boyven said that unusually high policy uncertainty this year has disrupted financial markets, and the Federal Reserve is powerless to solve this problem, and it has also been affected. He said that Federal Reserve Chairman Powell emphasized this point many times in his policy statement on Wednesday, pointing out that uncertainty is a reason for "(maintaining) policy inertia." "We believe that it will be difficult for the Fed to cut interest rates more than one or two times this year - even if long-term uncertainty begins to undermine otherwise healthy economic growth." (Jinshi)

data.title: Monad Testnet Addresses Surpass 30 Million Milestone
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Monad Explorer reveals that the total number of addresses on the Monad testnet has exceeded 30 million, reaching 30,865,754 addresses at the time of reporting. In the past 24 hours, approximately 3.81 million new addresses have been added. Previously, Foresight News reported that the Monad testnet was launched on February 19.
